propositions: In the CI lint + type-check job, make lint and make typecheck each run twice: once as named steps and again via pre-commit run --all-files re-invoking the local lint/typecheck hooks.
The pre-commit step SKIP env should be changed from no-commit-to-branch to no-commit-to-branch,lint,typecheck in both test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml so lint/typecheck run only once.
The lint and typecheck hooks must remain unchanged in .pre-commit-config.yaml so a local git commit still runs them.
A parity-test assertion in test_ci_workflow_parity.py must fail the build if the CI pre-commit step stops skipping lint/typecheck, guarding against the double-run returning.
Hygiene-only hooks (check-yaml/toml/merge-conflict/added-large-files) should still run via pre-commit while lint/typecheck gate via their direct named steps.
